topArticle.title: The clearest sign Father Time is closing in on Djokovic?
topArticle.description: Why Novak Djokovic's French Open exit is another golden opportunity lost for the 39-year-old as a new Grand Slam era dawns.
topArticle.titleJa: ジョコビッチに時の流れが迫っている最も明確な兆候か？
topArticle.summary: ノバク・ジョコビッチの全仏オープン敗退が、39歳の彼にとって新たなグランドスラム時代が幕開けする中で失われたもう一つの好機であることを示しています。

topArticle.title: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'

topArticle.title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
topArticle.description: The health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.

topArticle.title: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
topArticle.description: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory.

topArticle.title: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
topArticle.description: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

topArticle.title: South Africa made to look like fools after World Cup visa issues, says minister
topArticle.description: According to media reports, the team's departure for Mexico on Sunday has been delayed due to an "administrative bungle".

topArticle.title: Trump tightens terms on Iran war deal, US media say

topArticle.summary: 米国メディアによると、トランプ氏がイランとの和平合意条件を厳しくしたと報じられた。イラン側の返答には数日かかる見込み。

topArticle.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
topArticle.description: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.
topArticle.titleJa: ヴィラ、車、現金：イタリア、亡くなったマフィアの大物の数百万ドルを押収

topArticle.title: Labour triumphs in Malta election, preliminary results show
topArticle.description: Labour Party secures historic fourth term in Malta amid geopolitical and economic instability concerns.
topArticle.titleJa: マルタ総選挙で労働党が勝利、予備結果が示す
topArticle.summary: マルタの労働党が総選挙で歴史的な4期目を確保。地政学的および経済的な不安定性の懸念が高まる中での勝利。

topArticle.title: Brazil is set to cut in on China's rare earths dominance
topArticle.description: Brazil is seeing increasing demand for its vast reserves of rare earth elements. Global mining giants are betting on Brazil as the next powerhouse for critical magnetic metals and an alternative to China's dominance.
topArticle.titleJa: ブラジル、中国のレアアース支配に食い込む構え
topArticle.summary: ブラジルは豊富なレアアース埋蔵量への需要が高まっており、世界の鉱業大手は、中国の支配に対抗する次なる供給国としてブラジルに注目している。

topArticle.title: Germany news: Most expect AfD state premier after elections
topArticle.description: Most people in Germany expect a premier from the far-right AfD to lead at least one state after elections in the autumn, a survey has found. The Brenner Pass linking Austria and Italy has reopened. DW has more.
topArticle.titleJa: ドイツニュース：多くの人が選挙後にAfD州首相を予想
topArticle.summary: ドイツの調査によると、この秋の選挙後には、少なくとも1つの州で極右政党AfDから州首相が誕生すると多くの国民が予想している。

topArticle.title: Members consider Chinese request for dispute panel on solar, IT goods measures in India
topArticle.description: At a meeting of the Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) on 22 May, members considered a request from China for the establishment of a dispute panel to review measures in India affecting imports of solar cells, solar modules and information technology goods. The new DSB Chair, Ambassador Guilherme de Aguiar Patriota (Brazil), also made a statement on advancing the WTO's dispute settlement reform talks.
topArticle.titleJa: メンバー国、インドにおける太陽光・IT製品措置に関する中国の紛争パネル要請を検討
topArticle.summary: WTO紛争解決機関で、インドの太陽光・IT製品輸入措置に関する中国からの紛争パネル設置要請が審議された。

topArticle.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
topArticle.description: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.
topArticle.titleJa: イラン、新たな米軍空爆後に米軍基地を標的にしたと発表
topArticle.summary: 米国とイラン間の停戦が不安定な中、イランが米軍基地を攻撃したと発表。米軍の空爆への報復か。

topArticle.title: Ukraine: IAEA seeks access to Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant after reported drone strike
topArticle.description: Russia claims that a Ukrainian drone struck the Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant. Ukraine has denied the accusation. The International Atomic Energy Agency has sought to examine the facility.
topArticle.titleJa: ウクライナ：ザポリージャ原発へのドローン攻撃報道を受け、IAEAが立ち入り調査を要求
topArticle.summary: ロシアはウクライナのドローンがザポリージャ原発を攻撃したと主張。ウクライナはこれを否定しており、IAEAが施設への立ち入り調査を求めている。

topArticle.title: Bound by blood: new film highlights Jamaica’s outlawed obeah belief system
topArticle.description:
Stew Peas focuses on obeah, an enduring African magic practice in Jamaica banned by colonisers in the 1700s
A new movie from award-winning Jamaican film-maker Sosiessia Nixon shines a spotlight on Jamaica’s enduring west African-based magic and spiritual healing tradition known as obeah.
Nixon’s tense, feature-length suspense, Stew Peas, tells of the story of Jamaican detective Tessa, who is obsessed with an old murder case.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 血で結ばれた絆：ジャマイカの違法なオベア信仰システムを浮き彫りにする新作映画
topArticle.summary: ジャマイカの映画監督による新作が、植民地時代から禁止されてきたアフリカ起源の魔術的・精神治療の伝統「オベア」に焦点を当てる。

topArticle.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
topArticle.description: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.
topArticle.titleJa: ケニアで学校放火の疑いで8人の生徒が逮捕、死者も
topArticle.summary: 寮で寝ていた生徒16人が火災で死亡。ケニアで発生した疑わしい学校放火事件で、8人の生徒が逮捕された。

topArticle.title: Alarm at Mexico bill allowing elections to be annulled for ‘foreign interference’
topArticle.description:
Opposition says constitutional amendment would give bill ruling party carte blanche to overturn will of voters

Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email

Amid fierce criticism from opposition groups, Mexico’s senate has passed ‌a constitutional amendment to include “foreign interference” as grounds to annul election results in the country.
The bill, which was presented by the country’s president, Claudia Sheinbaum, defines foreign interference as “illicit financing, propaganda, the systematic ⁠dissemination of misinformation, digital manipulation, and ⁠the intervention of foreign governments ⁠or agencies”.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: メキシコ、選挙の「外国介入」による無効化を可能にする法案に懸念
topArticle.summary: メキシコ上院が「外国介入」を理由に選挙結果を無効にできる憲法改正案を可決。野党は、与党が有権者の意思を覆す全権を得ると批判している。

topArticle.title: Canadian man admits sending ‘suicide packets’ to hundreds of people around world
topArticle.description:
Kenneth Law, who sold lethal chemicals online with instructions on how to use them, admits counselling or aiding suicide

 ‘It was too easy’: families ask how Kenneth Law enabled so many suicides

A Canadian man who mailed “suicide packets” of poison to more than 100 people in dozens of countries – including Canada, the UK, the US, Italy, Australia and New Zealand – has pleaded guilty to 14 counts of assisting suicide.
Kenneth Law appeared in a packed courtroom in Newmarket, Ontario, on Friday to enter the plea after prosecutors agreed to withdraw 14 murder charges. Sentencing is expected to take place in September.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: カナダ人男性、数百人に「自殺キット」を世界中に送付したことを認める
topArticle.summary: カナダ人男性が、致死性の化学物質と使用説明書をオンラインで販売し、世界中の数百人に「自殺キット」を送付したとして、自殺幇助の罪を認めた。

topArticle.title: Anger at decision not to prosecute Canadian suicide kit supplier in UK
topArticle.description:
Kenneth Law pleaded guilty in Canada to sending products internationally, knowing they would probably be used to end lives
Bereaved families whose loved ones were the victims of an online supplier of suicide kits say they feel insulted by a decision not to prosecute him in the UK.
Kenneth Law pleaded guilty in a court in Ontario, Canada, to 14 charges of aiding suicide and sending products internationally in the knowledge that they were likely to be used to end lives. He is due to be sentenced at a later date.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 英国でカナダ人自殺キット供給者を起訴しない決定に怒り
topArticle.summary: カナダで自殺幇助の罪を認めた自殺キット供給者に対し、英国が起訴しない決定を下したことに、被害者の遺族から怒りの声が上がっている。

topArticle.title: Live for free on a Greek island: what you have to do

topArticle.titleJa: ギリシャの島で無料で暮らす：その条件とは？
topArticle.summary: ギリシャの夢のような島で無料で生活できますが、ある特定の条件を満たす必要があります。

topArticle.title: Pashinyan on course for landslide victory and pro-West mandate in Armenia election, new poll shows
topArticle.description: A new poll projects Armenian Premier Nikol Pashinyan’s party could win a large parliamentary majority, as Russia intensifies its campaign to counter Yerevan's pro-West realignment, warning of a Ukraine scenario.
topArticle.titleJa: 新たな世論調査でパシニャン氏がアルメニア選挙で地滑り的勝利と親西側路線への支持獲得へ

topArticle.title: Ukrainian drone attacks hit multiple Russian targets, including refinery

topArticle.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%

topArticle.title: How Nigerians are coping with heat waves amid crippling power outages

topArticle.title: The invisible migration: How urban refugees are powering Uganda’s economy

topArticle.summary: ウガンダでは、難民が成功するための手段を与えられると、彼らは生き残るだけでなく、ウガンダ経済の未来を築いていることが示されています。

topArticle.description: The deal is a significant boost for Hungary's leader, who has been in office for less than three weeks.

topArticle.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station

topArticle.description: Lawmakers who back the measure say it is key to restoring normality after four weeks of road blocks.

topArticle.title: Will US invade? Three ways Cuba crisis could play out now

topArticle.title: After decades risking arrest, South Korea's tattoo artists step into the limelight
topArticle.description: Only licensed doctors were allowed to ink tattoos in Korea - breaking the law could lead to heavy fines or jail.
topArticle.titleJa: 数十年逮捕のリスクを冒した後、韓国のタトゥーアーティストが脚光を浴びる
topArticle.summary: 韓国では長年、医師のみにタトゥーが許可されており、違反は罰金や投獄につながったが、今、アーティストたちが社会的に認知されつつある。

topArticle.title: The world's carmakers are struggling to compete with China
topArticle.description: The BBC visited China’s EV factories and found they are dominating the ecosystems shaping the global auto industry.
topArticle.titleJa: 世界の自動車メーカーは中国との競争に苦戦
topArticle.summary: BBCが中国のEV工場を訪問した結果、中国が世界の自動車産業の生態系を支配しつつあり、他国メーカーが競争に苦戦していることが明らかになった。

topArticle.title: How did this novel about food win a Booker Prize this year?
topArticle.description: Taiwan Travelogue is the first novel translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the prestigious award.
topArticle.titleJa: 食に関するこの小説はどのようにして今年のブッカー賞を受賞したのか？
topArticle.summary: 『台湾旅行記』は、北京語から翻訳された初の小説として、権威あるブッカー賞を受賞した画期的な作品となった。

topArticle.title: New Zealand launches safeguard investigation on certain aluminium extrusions
topArticle.description: On 27 May 2026, New Zealand notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards of the initiation on 28 May 2026 of a safeguard investigation on imports of certain aluminium extrusions.
topArticle.titleJa: ニュージーランド、特定アルミニウム押出材に対するセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: ニュージーランドは、特定のアルミニウム押出材の輸入に対するセーフガード調査を開始するとWTOに通知した。

topArticle.title: Sweden contributes SEK 2 million to WTO capacity-building activities
topArticle.description: Sweden has given SEK 2 million (just under CHF 170,000) to the WTO's Global Trust Fund for 2026 to finance technical assistance and training programmes for government officials from developing economies and least-developed countries (LDCs). The contribution was confirmed at a signing ceremony on 8 May at the WTO attended by Ambassador Nina Tornberg of Sweden and the WTO's Director of the Finance and Corporate Services Division, Andrew Rizk.
topArticle.titleJa: スウェーデン、WTOの能力構築活動に200万スウェーデン・クローナを拠出
topArticle.summary: スウェーデンがWTOのグローバル信託基金に200万スウェーデン・クローナを拠出し、開発途上国の能力構築プログラムを支援する。
